name: Southwest Skillet Supper
recipeIngredient: 2 cups chicken or turkey, cooked and diced
1 medium red or green pepper, cut into 1x1/4" strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and garlic in butter until the onion is tender.
2. Add chicken, zucchini, and pepper; sprinkle with cumin and salt.
3. Pour salsa over the chicken mixture; mix well.
4. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring frequently, until vegetables are crisp-tender and most of the liquid has evaporated, about 3-4 minutes.
Nutrition Analysis per serving: 181 calories; 23 grams protein; 6 grams carbohydrate; 7 grams fat; 378 milligrams sodium; 67 milligrams cholesterol.
